blurb: Continuity features – Handoff, Universal Clipboard, iPhone Cellular Call Relay, SMS Forwarding, Instant Hotspot, and iPhone Mirroring – use Bluetooth Low Energy device discovery combined with end-to-end encrypted peer-to-peer Wi-Fi or iCloud relay channels. Continuity relies on the Apple Identity Service to authenticate that both devices share the same iCloud account and to exchange public keys before establishing direct encrypted connections. Data transferred between devices is encrypted using keys derived from device-specific IDS key pairs, ensuring neither Apple's servers nor third parties can access transferred content even when routed through iCloud infrastructure.
